name: Pulmatrix, Inc.
business: Pulmatrix is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing inhaled therapeutic products using its iSPERSE dry powder delivery technology. Its pipeline includes candidates for acute migraine (PUR3100), acute exacerbations of COPD (PUR1800), and allergic bronchopulmonary aspergillosis (PUR1900). The company has no approved products and is currently exploring monetization of its assets while pursuing a merger with Cullgen.

exposures.sentence: We are a biopharmaceutical company that has focused on the development of novel inhaled therapeutic products intended to prevent and treat migraine and respiratory diseases with important unmet medical needs using our patented iSPERSE technology.

tamClaims.claim: At least 39 million people in the United States and 1 billion people worldwide live with migraine.
tamClaims.sentence: The American Migraine Foundation estimates that at least 39 million people in the United States and 1 billion people worldwide live with migraine, but because many people are not diagnosed or do not receive the treatment they need, the actual number may be higher.

tamClaims.claim: 18 million moderate-to-severe episodes of AECOPD in the US each year.
tamClaims.sentence: There are 18 million moderate-to-severe episodes of AECOPD in the US each year.

tamClaims.claim: Pulmonary Aspergillus infections affect approximately 14 million patients worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: Pulmonary Aspergillus infections affect approximately 14 million patients worldwide according to the Global Action Fund for Fungal Infections (Improving Outcomes for Patients with Fungal Infections across the World: A Road Map for the Next Decade).
